fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future. Macro backdrop: 10Y at 4.50% (-2.57% over 5d, falling), DXY 99.20 (+0.24% over 5d, flat) — see the Bonds & USD tab for how this typically translates to ETF. No fresh ticker-specific articles were readable this build; treat this take as background context, not a catalyst.

examples.body: $UVXY $UVIX Iran could drop a nuke and these tickers would drop 5%…. 🙄😣
